title: hemionitis myriophylla
intro: Hemionitis myriophylla, also known as the fern of the tropics, is a species of fern belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Hemionitis myriophylla include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Hemionitis myriophylla can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used as a topical application for its medicinal properties, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal remedies.
